---
title: "\'Studies in German Literature\'"
---

## \'Studies in German Literature\'

**Author:** M. Watson
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (January-June 1891)

### Notes

The articles are signed M. W. but the author seems to have been a [[person:2096]Miss Watson] of Brightwell, Tetsworth, Oxfordshire.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
